description: Implement ledger router and ledger writer governance contract based on roadmap item 11. Create governance/ledger_router_contract.md to establish routing rules, writer path authority, and next actor governance protocols for the autonomous ledger system.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap item 11 LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT is next after completed item 10 UNIVERSAL EXECUTOR / AUDITOR EXCHANGE LEDGER LOOP
